name: Scampi Al Fresco
recipeIngredient: 1/2 tsp Crumbled dry mint OR 1 tsp Fresh Mint, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil and butter in a skillet over medium heat.
2. When the fat is hot, add the shrimp and cook over high heat, turning them constantly until they turn pink.
3. As soon as the shrimp change color, remove from heat and stir in the parsley, garlic, mint, salt, and pepper.
4. Add 1 tablespoon of lemon juice and taste; if needed, add more tang by adding the remaining 1/2 tablespoon lemon juice.
5. Serve with hot cooked fettuccine.
